recommendations.title: Crossfire
recommendations.overview: A man is murdered, apparently by one of a group of soldiers just out of the army. But which one? And why?

recommendations.title: The Young Lions
recommendations.overview: The lives of three young men, a German and two Americans, during WWII.

recommendations.title: The Caine Mutiny
recommendations.overview: When a US Naval captain shows signs of mental instability that jeopardize his ship, the first officer relieves him of command and faces court martial for mutiny.

recommendations.title: Mirage

recommendations.title: Warlock

recommendations.title: The Big Sleep
recommendations.overview: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.
